title: Entitlement to paternity leave
content:
(1)	
A male employee is entitled to paternity leave in respect of 
the birth of a child if—
	
(a)	
he is the child’s father;
	
(b)	
he has been employed under a continuous contract 
immediately before taking leave; and
	
(c)	
he has complied with all the requirements in section
